// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="Team"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableTeam
    {
        private Team _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableTeam"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableTeam(Team record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Name = _record.Name;
            Members = _record.Members.ToList();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="Team"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public Team Build()
        {
            return _record with
            {
                Name = this.Name,
                Members = this.Members.ToImmutableList(),
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="Team"/> to <see cref="MutableTeam"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableTeam(Team record)
        {
            return new MutableTeam(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableTeam"/> to <see cref="Team"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator Team(MutableTeam mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Name.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the ImmutableCollection Members.
        /// </summary>
        public List<string> Members { get; set; }
    }
}
